ddls:
CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "contact_id" TEXT /* Contact ID associated with the household */,
  "created_date_custom" TEXT /* Custom date of household creation */,
  "is_person_account" INTEGER /* Indicates if the household is a person account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the household was created in the system */,
  "city_state" TEXT /* City and state of the household */,
  "contacts_traced" INTEGER /* Number of contacts traced to the household */,
  "household_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the household */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the household */,
  "household_type" TEXT /* Type of household (e.g., family, single, elderly) */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the household */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the household record was updated */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score representing the household's engagement level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the contact */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the contact */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the contact */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the contact */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household member */,
  "household_id" TEXT /* Reference to the household they belong to */,
  "contact_id" TEXT /* Contact ID of the member */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the member to the household (e.g., spouse, child) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the household member */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the household member */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the household member */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the household member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_members_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "household_id" TEXT /* Reference to the household involved in the interaction */,
  "contact_id" TEXT /* Reference to the contact involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., call, email, meeting) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the interaction */,
  "interaction_result" TEXT /* Result of the interaction (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "interaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the interaction occurred (e.g., phone, email, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the campaign (e.g., young families, seniors) */,
  "expected_reach" INTEGER /* Expected number of households the campaign aims to reach */,
  "actual_reach" INTEGER /* Actual number of households reached */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign targeting the household */,
  "household_id" TEXT /* Reference to the household being targeted */,
  "expected_conversion" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the household is expected to convert */,
  "actual_conversion" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the household actually converted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_targets_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_targets_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to users with this role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the role was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "household_id" TEXT /* Reference to the household associated with the note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., follow-up, reminder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly summary, campaign performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view campaigns, edit contacts) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the permission allows */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the permission was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
